---
title: "Reef SfM Workflow"
description: "A detailed end-to-end workflow for processing underwater photos into 3D reef models using Structure-from-Motion photogrammetry."
date: "2025-02-01"
categories: [marine science, photogrammetry, workflow, 3D]
image: ../images/reef-sfm.jpg
---

## Overview

This project documents a complete SfM processing pipeline for coral reef surveys,
from image acquisition underwater through to final 3D model outputs and quality
assessment.

## Workflow Steps

### 1. Image Acquisition
- Camera settings and housing recommendations
- Dive survey protocols for optimal overlap
- Lighting considerations for underwater photography

### 2. Processing in Agisoft Metashape
- Photo alignment and sparse point cloud
- Dense point cloud generation
- Mesh and orthomosaic export

### 3. Quality Assessment
- Ground control points (GCPs)
- Error metrics and reprojection error
- Visual inspection of model artifacts

### 4. Outputs
- Orthomosaic (2D georeferenced image)
- Digital elevation model (DEM)
- 3D mesh for structural complexity analysis

## Tools Used

- Agisoft Metashape
- QGIS
- Python (point cloud analysis)

## Status

🚧 *In progress — workflow documentation being developed.*
